body_lines: - constraints: no parallel heavy jobs, preserve audit trail
- deliverables: rollout checklist + rollback plan + smoke commands

cases.description: 產品決策紀錄與取捨原因
body_lines: - decision: enforce mention-only response in shared channel
- rationale: avoid simultaneous role thinking overload
- tradeoff: slower response speed but lower collision risk
- followup: add per-role cooldown metrics in dashboard
- incident: role2 no response after token rotation
- root_cause: message-content intent mismatch and stale relay process
- mitigation: restart relay stack and validate intents one by one
- prevention: onboarding checklist must include token and intent probes
